Just finished watching and I quite enjoyed it. Not gonna say it's perfect as there were certain parts that were clearly rushed and not expanded further but still a good enough conclusion from where it left off. With Netflix being Netflix, the staff did a respectable job cramming all the content meant to last for two more seasons into this final one with all the budget restraints and just 8 episodes of around 25 minutes (the last being around 31 at least). Loved the development and interactions between the main characters. It might be just me but the animation also felt improved compared to the previous seasons and of course the voice actors did an amazing job. The soundtrack being a good fit as always too. With everything said, I'm just glad to see this show getting to properly end and not outright cancelled like various others. Kudos to the Creators and looking forward to see more works from them in the future.
